title: Query with not joins and condition returning the wrong result
poc:
SELECT "t9d"."c8v__y_g_0"  AS "c99__y_g_0",
          "t9d"."c8w__y_g_1"  AS "c9a__y_g_1",
          CAST(NULL AS bigint) AS "c9b_axis_1_sort_0_1"
   FROM  "t9d"
   WHERE
    NOT EXISTS
    (
     SELECT
      1 AS "one"
     FROM
      "t9c"
     WHERE (
 			( "t9d"."c8v__y_g_0" = "t9c"."c8l__y_g_0"
 			  OR 
 		      ("t9d"."c8v__y_g_0" IS NULL AND  "t9c"."c8l__y_g_0" IS NULL)
 			)
      AND
 			( "t9d"."c8w__y_g_1" = "t9c"."c8m__y_g_1"
 			  OR
 			  ("t9d"."c8w__y_g_1" IS NULL AND  "t9c"."c8m__y_g_1" IS NULL)
 			)
 		)
 	);
key_bug_features: Query with NOT EXISTS condition returning incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "t9f" ("c8d__y_g_0" varchar(255) NOT NULL, "c8e__y_g_1" bigint DEFAULT 0, "c8f__y_g_2" date);
SELECT * FROM "t9e" WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "t9f" WHERE "t9e"."c8a__y_g_0" = "t9f"."c8d__y_g_0");
